```{r params}
lower = TRUE
```
```{r }
  # freqPPN_nodes <- gsub(x = freqPPN$x, "\\.", "\\\\.")

vert <- c("Mr.", "Mrs.", "Dr.")
text <- c( "Mr. Smith and Mrs. Jones went to see Dr. Brown. Mr. Smith is a patient. ADr. lorem")

result <- freq_nodes(vert, text)
vert <- gsub(x = vert, "\\.", "\\\\.")
text |> stringr::str_extract_all(pattern = paste0("\\b", vert, "\\b"))
text |> stringr::str_extract_all(pattern = stringr::fixed(paste0("\\b", vert, "\\b")))
text |> stringr::str_extract_all(pattern = "Mr.")
text |> stringr::str_extract_all(pattern = "Mr\\.")
text |> stringr::str_extract_all(pattern = stringr::fixed("Mr."))
text |> stringr::str_extract_all(pattern = stringr::fixed("\\bMr."))
text |> stringr::str_extract_all(pattern = stringr::regex("\\b", stringr::fixed("Mr."), "\\b"))
text |> stringr::str_extract_all(pattern = "Mr." |> stringr::fixed())

text |>tolower() |>  stringr::str_extract_all( "\\bmr\\.")
text |>tolower() |>  stringr::str_extract_all( "\\bdr\\.")
# text |> stringr::str_locate_all(pattern = stringr::fixed("Mr."))
```
```{r fun escape_regex}
escape_regex <- function(string, word_delim =F) {
  string <- gsub("([.[\\(*+?{|^$])", "\\\\\\1", string)
  if (word_delim){
    string <- 
      paste0("\\b", string, "\\b")
    #  paste0("\\b", string)
      }
  return(string)
}

# fixed_part <- "Mr."
# escaped_fixed <- escape_regex(fixed_part)
# pattern <- paste0("\\b", escaped_fixed, "\\b")
escape_regex(vert)
escape_regex(vert, T)

text |> tolower() |> stringr::str_extract_all(pattern = escape_regex(vert, T))

```
```{r }
vert <- tolower(vert)
v <- vert[1]

lapply(vert, \(v) {
text |>
  tolower() |>
  stringr::str_extract_all(
    pattern = paste0("\\b", escape_regex(v) , "\\b")
    # pattern = stringr::fixed(v))
    # pattern = stringr::fixed(paste0("\\b", v, "\\b"))
  )
})
```
```{r }
vert <- c("Mr. Smith", "Mrs. Jones", "Dr. Brown")
text <- "Mr. Smith and Mrs. Jones went to see Dr. Brown. Mr. Smith is a patient. AMr."

vert <- tolower(vert) |> escape_regex(word_delim = TRUE)
txt <- tolower(text)

lapply(vert, \(v) {
  txt |>
  stringr::str_extract_all(
    pattern = v
    # pattern = stringr::fixed(paste0("\\b", v, "\\b"))
  )
})
```
```{r }
vert <- c("Mr. Smith", "Mrs. Jones", "Dr. Brown")
text <- "Mr. Smith and Mrs. Jones went to see Dr. Brown. Mr. Smith is a patient. AMr."
freq_nodes(vert, text)
```
```{r }
vert <- "New_Delhi"
text <- "The central axis of New_Delhi, which today faces east at India Gate"
freq_nodes(vert, text)
```
```{r }
freq_nodes( "t.me/canalsemnom/936" ,
  "lorem t.me/canalsemnom/936, and t.me/canalsemnom/936")
```
```{r }
txt <- "High Frequency Active Auroral Research Program  Patente HAARP - 690,333 10-Jan-1985  Patent Number - 4,6d6,605 - 11-Ago-1987  Aquecimento da Iono sfera  Furac칚o KATRINA  An칠is HAARP  Tsunami no Jap칚o  HAARP - Controle do C lima  CHEMTRAILS - Rastros Qu칤micos  MKULTRA - Controle Mental  + 游뱐 A Farsa do Aquecimento Global 游꺉 t.me/CanalSemNOM/1261 游녣  Tema: 游녤 HAARP 游녤 A Fars a do Aquecimento Global 游녤 Redu칞칚o Populacional 游녤 NOVA ERA 游녤 Nova_Ordem_Mu ndial  @CanalSemNOM"
freq_nodes( "t.me/canalsemnom/1261" ,txt )

cooc <- txt |> cooccur_words(sw = s2v("a do o e de da dos das"))
plot_graph2(cooc, txt)
```
```{r df2 df3}
library(lubridate)

df2 <- read.csv2("/home/alisson/Documentos/Programa칞칚o/R/shared/UFBA/artigo_conspiracoes_Br/data/elastic_telegram_haarp_normalizado.csv") |> tibble::as_tibble() |> 
  dplyr::mutate(date = lubridate::as_datetime(strict_date)) |> 
      dplyr::select(date, chat_title, all_text, text, message_caption, sender_chat_id, id, chat_id, from_user_id, forward_sender_name, type,from_user_is_bot) 

df3 <- bind_rows(
  df2[year(df2$date) == 2022 & month(df2$date) == 9, ],
  df2[year(df2$date) == 2023 & month(df2$date) == 2, ],
  df2[year(df2$date) == 2024 & month(df2$date) == 5, ],
  ) |>
  mutate(date = as.Date(date),
    all_text = sto::compound_words(all_text, "Estados_Unidos"))

df3_ <- df3 |>
  dplyr::mutate(ym = lubridate::ymd(date) |> as.character() |> gsub2("-\\d+$"),
  year = year(date))

termos_all_coll <- "\\bvulc[칚a칙]|alagado|alagamento|alarme|alerta|aluvi칚o|calamidade|cat치strofe|catastr칩fico|cheia|chovendo|chuva|ciclone|clim치tico|colapso|cyclone|desabamento|desabrigad|desalojado|desastre|deslizamento|destr ui칞칚o|devasta칞칚o|dil칰vio|earthquake|el ni침o|emerg칡ncia|enchente|enxurrada|eros칚o|erup칞칚o|estiagem|extremo|fatalidade|fluvial|furac칚o|geada|geol칩gico|granizo|hidrol칩gico|hurricane|imprevis칤vel|interdi칞칚o|inund[a o]|la ni침a|lahar|lama|meteorol칩gico|mon칞칚o|neblina|nevasca|nevoeiro|ni침|pluvial|precipit|quake|rachadura|rain|rajada|repentino|resgate|ressaca|seca|soterramento|storm|subsid칡ncia|sulco|tempestade|terramoto|terremoto|tornado|torrencia|transbordamento|tsunami|tuf칚o|typhoons|vendaval|vento|v칤tima|vulc칙nica" 

txt_desastre <- df3_ |>
  filter(year == 2024) |>
  pull(all_text) |>
  tokenizers::tokenize_sentences(simplify=TRUE) |>
  unlist() |>
  # filter(grepl2(txt, termos_all))
  sto::grep2(termos_all_coll) |>
  unique() |>
  stringr::str_replace_all("t.me/CanalSemNOM/.*\\b", "t.me/canalsemnom")

graph_desastre <- txt_desastre |> cooccur_words(sw_all, output = "df2")
graph_desastre <- graph_desastre |> reduce_freq(3)
graph_desastre |>
    filter_graph_g("haarp",T, T) |>
  plot_graph2(text = txt_desastre, head_n = 200, edge_color = "blue", edge_alpha = 0.6, node_alpha = 0.4, text_contour_color = "white")

```
